metadata.description: Optional. Reverse the normal Cloud Adoption Framework naming convention by putting the resource type abbreviation at the end of the resource name.
Optional. Remote Location to which an Image Gallery will be deployed to support regional disaster recovery.

Optional. Indicates whether the storage account permits requests to be authorized with the account access key via Shared Key. If false, then all requests, including shared access signatures, must be authorized with Azure Active Directory (Azure AD). The default value is null, which is equivalent to true.
Optional. The Resource Id of the Private DNS Zone where the Private Endpoint (if configured) A record will be registered.
Optional. Network access configuration for the artifacts storage account.
Optional. The ResourceId of the private endpoint subnet.
Optional. Array of permitted IPs or IP CIDR blocks that can access the storage account using the Public Endpoint.
Optional. An array of subnet resource IDs where Service Endpoints will be created to allow access to the storage account through the public endpoint.
Optional. The tags by resource type to apply to the resources created by this template.

Optional. Deploy the artifacts storage account and managed identity. Set to false when you only need the gallery and all image customizations use fully-qualified public URIs or an externally-managed storage account.
Optional. Key management solution for both the artifacts and build logs storage accounts.
Optional. Resource ID of the Key Vault for CMK encryption. Required when keyManagementStorageAccount is CustomerManaged or CustomerManagedHSM.
Optional. Number of days before the CMK expires and auto-rotates.

Optional. Deploy a dedicated storage account in the imageManagement resource group to persist image build customization logs. When enabled, pass the `buildLogsStorageAccountResourceId` output to imageBuild as `existingLogStorageAccountResourceId`.
DO NOT MODIFY THIS VALUE! The timestamp is needed to differentiate deployments for certain Azure resources and must be set using a parameter.

variables.nameConv_ImageManagement_ResGroup: [if(parameters('nameConvResTypeAtEnd'), format('avd-{0}-{1}', variables('identifier'), variables('nameConvSuffix')), format('RESOURCETYPE-avd-{0}-{1}', variables('identifier'), variables('nameConvSuffix')))]
variables.nameConv_ImageManagement_Resources: [if(parameters('nameConvResTypeAtEnd'), format('avd-{0}-{1}', variables('identifier'), variables('nameConvSuffix')), format('RESOURCETYPE-avd-{0}-{1}', variables('identifier'), variables('nameConvSuffix')))]
variables.storageNetworkAcls: [if(equals(parameters('storageNetworkAccess'), 'PrivateEndpoint'), if(empty(variables('ipRules')), createObject('bypass', 'None', 'defaultAction', 'Deny'), createObject('bypass', 'None', 'defaultAction', 'Deny', 'ipRules', variables('ipRules'))), if(equals(parameters('storageNetworkAccess'), 'ServiceEndpoint'), createObject('bypass', 'None', 'defaultAction', 'Deny', 'ipRules', variables('ipRules'), 'virtualNetworkRules', variables('virtualNetworkRules')), if(not(empty(variables('ipRules'))), createObject('bypass', 'None', 'defaultAction', 'Deny', 'ipRules', variables('ipRules')), createObject('bypass', 'None', 'defaultAction', 'Allow'))))]

metadata.description: Required. Name of the Azure Compute Gallery.
Optional. Location for all resources.
Optional. Tags to apply to the gallery.
Optional. Description of the Azure Compute Gallery.
Required. Resource ID of the Key Vault in which keys will be created.
Required. CMK type — drives key type (RSA vs RSA-HSM) and disk encryption type.
Optional. Key expiration in days. Also controls auto-rotation: keys rotate 7 days before expiry.
Optional. Azure region for UAIs and DiskEncryptionSets. Defaults to resource group location.
Optional. Tags to apply to created resources. Uses standard Azure resource-type tag bag pattern.
Optional. Resource ID to stamp as the cm-resource-parent tag on keys and identities.
Optional. Suffix appended to deployment names for uniqueness.

Optional. Names of Key Vault keys to create for storage account CMK encryption.
One key is created per entry. All keys are assigned to the single storageIdentityName UAI.
For a single storage account, pass a one-element array.
For FSLogix with multiple accounts, pass all key names (one per account).
Optional. Name of the user-assigned identity to create for storage CMK. Required when storageKeyNames is not empty.

Optional. Array of disk encryption set CMK configurations.
Each entry produces: one KV key (unless confidentialVM), one DiskEncryptionSet,
one key-scoped role assignment (Crypto Service Encryption User).
  keyName                       — name of the key to create
  diskEncryptionSetName         — name of the DiskEncryptionSet to create
  confidentialVMOSDiskEncryption — when true, skips key creation (key is created
                                   via run command by the Confidential VM
                                   infrastructure) and uses ConfidentialVmEncryptedWithCustomerKey
  confidentialVMOrchestratorObjectId — required when confidentialVMOSDiskEncryption is true;
                                       object ID of the Confidential VM Orchestrator
                                       enterprise application (bf7b6499-ff71-4aa2-97a4-f372087be7f0)
Key type.
RSA key size in bits.
Whether the key is enabled for use.
Whether the private key can be exported.
Optional. Key rotation policy.
Optional. Tags to apply to the key.
Role definition GUID or fully-qualified resource ID (e.g. "b24988ac-..." or "/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/...").
Object (principal) ID of the identity receiving the role.
Type of the assigned principal. Defaults to ServicePrincipal.
Optional human-readable description for the assignment.
A single role assignment to apply to a specific resource.
Role assignments to apply to this key vault key.
Key type.
RSA key size in bits.
Whether the key is enabled for use.
Whether the private key can be exported.
Optional. Key rotation policy.
Optional. Tags to apply to the key.
Key Vault resource ID containing the encryption key.
Name of the key in the Key Vault.
Version of the key to use. Leave empty to resolve the current version at deploy time.
Encryption type.
Automatically rotate to the latest key version.
Assign a system-assigned managed identity to the disk encryption set.

activeKey.keyUrl: [if(empty(parameters('keyVersion')), reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', variables('keyVaultSub'), variables('keyVaultRG')), 'Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/keys', variables('keyVaultName'), parameters('keyName')), '2023-07-01').keyUriWithVersion, format('{0}/{1}', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', variables('keyVaultSub'), variables('keyVaultRG')), 'Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/keys', variables('keyVaultName'), parameters('keyName')), '2023-07-01').keyUri, parameters('keyVersion')))]

metadata.description: Role definition GUID or fully-qualified resource ID (e.g. "b24988ac-..." or "/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/...").
Object (principal) ID of the identity receiving the role.
Type of the assigned principal. Defaults to ServicePrincipal.
Optional human-readable description for the assignment.
A single role assignment to apply to a specific resource.
Role assignments to apply to this key vault key.

Object (principal) ID of the identity receiving the role.
Type of the assigned principal. Defaults to ServicePrincipal.
Optional human-readable description for the assignment.
A single role assignment to apply to a specific resource.
Role assignments to apply to this key vault key.
Resource ID of the shared storage encryption user-assigned identity. Empty when storageKeyNames is empty.
Principal ID of the shared storage encryption user-assigned identity. Empty when storageKeyNames is empty.
Disk CMK results — one entry per diskEncryptionConfigs element.
Category group name, e.g. "allLogs". Use either categoryGroup or category, not both.
Individual log category name. Use either categoryGroup or category, not both.
Optional. Override name for the diagnostic setting resource. If omitted, a deterministic name is generated from the workspace ID.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace to send logs to.
Resource ID of the storage account to archive logs to.
Resource ID of the Event Hub authorization rule.
Name of the Event Hub. If omitted, a hub is created for each log category.
Log categories to stream. Defaults to allLogs when omitted.
Services allowed to bypass network rules. Comma-separated: AzureServices, Logging, Metrics, None.
Default action when no rule matches.
SKU/replication type.
Optional. Scope restriction for copy operations.
Optional. SAS expiration period in format d.hh:mm:ss. Empty to disable.
Optional. Azure Files identity-based authentication settings object.
Optional. Key Vault URI for customer-managed key encryption.
Optional. Key Vault key name for customer-managed encryption.
Optional. Resource ID of user-assigned identity with key vault access for CMK.
